title: Prisoners in Petticoats
writer: Bradbury Foote, Raymond L. Schrock, George Callahan
actors: Valentine Perkins, Robert Rockwell, Danni Sue Nolan
plot: Joan Grey is a young pianist that falls for the good manners and nice clothes of a gang of mobsters. She is warned by Mark Hampton, an investigator, that she is associating with gangsters and she is heading for trouble. She refuse...
